title: Create: The Age of the Sky
description: A Modpack for the Create Mod with fun adittions.
body:
# ⚙️ Create: The Age of the Sky

> 🚆 Trains • ⚙️ Automation • ✨ Magic • 🎨 Decoration • 🏙️ City Building

---
![Banner](https://cloud.endernation.net/index.php/s/8SiJGeqHpZksBFE/preview)

## 🌍 Welcome

Create: The Age of the Sky is a modpack centered around Create and its ecosystem of addons.

Build automated factories, design large railway networks, construct detailed cities, explore magical systems, and create unique infrastructure projects.

Whether you enjoy engineering, architecture, transportation, decoration, or progression-based gameplay, the pack offers a wide variety of possibilities while keeping Create at its core.

---

## 🏭 Automation & Engineering

Create forms the foundation of the modpack.

Build:

* Automated factories
* Resource processing systems
* Mechanical contraptions
* Industrial production lines
* Large-scale infrastructure projects

A carefully selected collection of Create addons expands the possibilities even further, providing additional tools, machines, building options, and quality-of-life improvements.

### 📸 Factory Showcase

![Factory Screenshot](https://cloud.endernation.net/index.php/s/BaDqwnwQYg7Y9o3/preview)

---

## 🚆 Railways & Transportation

Transportation plays an important role throughout the pack.

Create railway systems that connect your factories, cities, and settlements using Create's train mechanics and supporting addons.

Features include:

* Train networks
* Station construction
* Logistics systems
* Long-distance transportation
* Navigation enhancements

### 📸 Trains Showcase

![Train Screenshot](https://cloud.endernation.net/index.php/s/waLPPJTPXQQxJEX/preview)
![Train Screenshot](https://cloud.endernation.net/index.php/f/156981/preview)
---

## ✈️ Aeronautics

Take your engineering projects to the skies.

With Create: Aeronautics, players can design and build fully functional airships and flying machines, opening up new possibilities for transportation, exploration, and creativity.

Whether you're constructing a small personal aircraft or a massive flying base, the sky is no longer the limit.

---

## ✨ Magic & Alternative Progression

Alongside technology, the modpack also includes magical progression paths.

Current magical content includes:

* Ars Nouveau
* Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks

Learn powerful spells, experiment with magical systems, and discover new ways to complement your engineering projects.

---

## 🎨 Building & Decoration

The modpack isn't only about machines and automation.

A large selection of decorative content allows players to create detailed and immersive builds, including:

* Decorative blocks
* Graffiti features
* Modern building elements
* Interior decoration
* City-building components
* Creative building tools

Whether you're building an industrial district, a train station, a modern city, or a small village, you'll have plenty of options to bring your ideas to life.

### 📸 Building Showcase

![Building Screenshot](https://cloud.endernation.net/index.php/s/bbr5PnmyfYtq9Wq/preview)
![Building Screenshot](https://cloud.endernation.net/index.php/s/rsmwHYN76P7o79B/preview)
---

## 🏙️ Infrastructure & Accessibility

Expand your builds with additional transportation and infrastructure systems.

Included features allow for:

* Escalators
* Moving walkways
* Improved navigation within large structures

Perfect for transportation hubs, skyscrapers, shopping centers, airports, and large city projects.

### 📸 Infrastructure Showcase

![Infrastructure Screenshot](https://cloud.endernation.net/index.php/s/CNRdnENWyTae8eS/preview)

---

## 🔄 Active Development

The modpack is actively maintained and regularly updated.

Development may include:

* New content
* Mod updates
* Bug fixes
* Performance improvements
* Balancing adjustments
* Community-driven changes

Our goal is to continuously improve the experience while maintaining stability and compatibility.

---

## 💡 Community Feedback

Your feedback helps shape the future of the modpack.

If you have:

* Mod suggestions
* Balance feedback
* Bug reports
* Feature requests

Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/endernation) community and share your ideas.

After verification, you'll be able to access the community channels dedicated to modpack discussions, suggestions, and future development.


---

## ❤️ Recommended For

✅ Create Players

✅ Automation Enthusiasts

✅ Train Builders

✅ City Builders

✅ Decoration Fans

✅ Magic Users

✅ Multiplayer Communities

---

# 🚀 Start Small. Build Bigger.

### Create: The Age of the Sky
